title: ORDR-Connect Audit Event
description: Immutable WORM audit event for SOC2/ISO27001/HIPAA compliance. Each event is cryptographically linked to its predecessor via SHA-256 hash chain.

id.description: Unique identifier for the audit event (UUID v4)

sequenceNumber.description: Monotonically increasing sequence number per tenant — no gaps allowed

tenantId.description: Tenant scope for this audit event

actorType.description: Type of entity that performed the action

actorId.description: Identifier of the actor — user ID, agent ID, or 'system'

resourceId.description: Identifier of the specific resource instance

details.description: Additional context — MUST NOT contain PHI/PII in plaintext. Use tokenized references only.

previousHash.description: SHA-256 hash of the preceding event in the chain (or genesis hash for first event)

hash.description: SHA-256 hash of this event including all fields and previousHash

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the event occurred

metadata.description: Optional metadata for extended audit context

ipAddress.description: IP address of the request origin

correlationId.description: Request correlation ID for distributed tracing
